AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload.description: Specifies the days since the initiation of an incomplete multipart upload that Amazon S3 will wait before permanently removing all parts of the upload.

DaysAfterInitiation.description: Specifies the number of days after which Amazon S3 aborts an incomplete multipart upload.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the specified bucket.

BucketEncryption.description: Specifies default encryption for a bucket using server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3) or AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS).

Destination.description: Specifies information about where to publish inventory reports for an Amazon S3 Express bucket.

BucketAccountId.description: The account ID that owns the destination S3 bucket.

BucketArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the destination Amazon S3 bucket to which data is exported.

Format.description: Specifies the file format used when exporting data to Amazon S3.

Prefix.description: The prefix to use when exporting data. The prefix is prepended to all results.

InventoryConfiguration.description: Specifies an inventory configuration for an Amazon S3 Express bucket

Enabled.description: Specifies whether the inventory is enabled or disabled.

Id.description: The ID used to identify the inventory configuration.

IncludedObjectVersions.description: Object versions to include in the inventory list.

OptionalFields.description: Contains the optional fields that are included in the inventory results.

Prefix.description: The prefix that is prepended to all inventory results.

ScheduleFrequency.description: Specifies the schedule for generating inventory results.

Rules.description: A lifecycle rule for individual objects in an Amazon S3 Express bucket.

MetricsConfiguration.description: Specifies a metrics configuration for the CloudWatch request metrics from an Amazon S3 Express bucket.

AccessPointArn.description: The access point ARN used when evaluating a metrics filter.

Id.description: The ID used to identify the metrics configuration.

Prefix.description: The prefix used when evaluating a metrics filter.

Rule.description: You must specify at least one of the following properties: AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload, or ExpirationInDays.

ServerSideEncryptionByDefault.description: Specifies the default server-side encryption to apply to new objects in the bucket. If a PUT Object request doesn't specify any server-side encryption, this default encryption will be applied.

KMSMasterKeyID.description: AWS Key Management Service (KMS) customer managed key ID to use for the default encryption. This parameter is allowed only if SSEAlgorithm is set to aws:kms. You can specify this parameter with the key ID or the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key

ServerSideEncryptionRule.description: Specifies the default server-side encryption configuration.

BucketKeyEnabled.description: Specifies whether Amazon S3 should use an S3 Bucket Key with server-side encryption using KMS (SSE-KMS) for new objects in the bucket. Existing objects are not affected. Amazon S3 Express One Zone uses an S3 Bucket Key with SSE-KMS and S3 Bucket Key cannot be disabled. It's only allowed to set the BucketKeyEnabled element to true.

Arn.description: Returns the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the specified bucket.

AvailabilityZoneName.description: Returns the code for the Availability Zone or Local Zone where the directory bucket was created. An example for the code of an Availability Zone is 'us-east-1f'.

BucketName.description: Specifies a name for the bucket. The bucket name must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (-). A directory bucket name must be unique in the chosen Availability Zone or Local Zone. The bucket name must also follow the format 'bucket_base_name--zone_id--x-s3'. The zone_id can be the ID of an Availability Zone or a Local Zone. If you don't specify a name, AWS CloudFormation generates a unique physical ID and uses that ID for the bucket name.

DataRedundancy.description: Specifies the number of Availability Zone or Local Zone that's used for redundancy for the bucket.

InventoryConfigurations.description: The inventory configuration for an Amazon S3 Express bucket.

LifecycleConfiguration.description: Lifecycle rules that define how Amazon S3 Express manages objects during their lifetime.

LocationName.description: Specifies the Zone ID of the Availability Zone or Local Zone where the directory bucket will be created. An example Availability Zone ID value is 'use1-az5'.

MetricsConfigurations.description: Specifies the metrics configurations for the Amazon S3 Express bucket.
